mapper.update: UPDATE hpeapm."xbpj_operation_flow" a SET "bonc_audit_point"=#{auditCode}, cmwa_export_path = #{cmwaExportPath}, cmca_file_type = #{cmcaFileType}, cmca_subject_id = #{cmcaSubjectId}, source_code = #{sourceCode}, belong_cmwa = #{belongCmwa}, "version" = #{version}, allow_down = #{allowDown} WHERE "modelno" LIKE '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hpeapm."xbpj_operation_flow" a WHERE a."modelno" LIKE '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hpeapm.xbpj_operation_flow (business1, business2, source, business_area, field, AuditpointNo, AuditpointName, ModelNo, ModelName, model_type, bonc_audit_point, source_domain, model_online_time, audit_scope, model_url, model_OnlineJi_Time, model_logic, home_system, data_source, datastart_time, modelrunning_frequency, is_cured, "order", cmwa_export_path, cmca_file_type, cmca_subject_id, source_code, belong_cmwa, version, allow_down, secondary_field, source_old, field_old) VALUES ( #{business1},#{business2},#{source},#{businessAre},#{field},#{auditPointNo},#{auditPointName},#{modelNo},#{modelName},#{model_type},#{auditCode},#{sourceDomain}, #{model_online_time},#{audit_scope},#{model_url},#{model_OnlineJi_Time},#{model_logic},#{home_system},#{data_source},#{datastart_time}, #{modelrunning_frequency},#{is_cured},#{order},#{cmwaExportPath}, #{cmcaFileType},#{cmcaSubjectId},#{sourceCode},#{belongCmwa},#{version},#{allowDown},#{secondaryField},'','' )
mapper.update: UPDATE hpeapm."xbpj_operation_flow" SET business1 LIKE '%'||#{business1}||'%', business2 LIKE '%'||#{business2}||'%', source LIKE '%'||#{source}||'%', business_area LIKE '%'||#{businessArea}||'%', "field" LIKE '%'||#{field}||'%', AuditpointNo LIKE '%'||#{auditPointNo}||'%', AuditpointName LIKE '%'||#{auditPointName}||'%', ModelName LIKE '%'||#{modelName}||'%', model_type LIKE '%'||#{model_type}||'%', bonc_audit_point LIKE '%'||#{auditCode}||'%', source_domain LIKE '%'||#{sourceDomain}||'%', model_online_time LIKE '%'||#{model_online_time}||'%', audit_scope LIKE '%'||#{audit_scope}||'%', model_url LIKE '%'||#{model_url}||'%', model_OnlineJi_Time LIKE '%'||#{model_OnlineJi_Time}||'%', model_logic LIKE '%'||#{model_logic}||'%', home_system LIKE '%'||#{home_system}||'%', data_source LIKE '%'||#{data_source}||'%', datastart_time LIKE '%'||#{datastart_time}||'%', modelrunning_frequency LIKE '%'||#{modelrunning_frequency}||'%', is_cured LIKE '%'||#{is_cured}||'%', "order" LIKE '%'||#{order}||'%', cmwa_export_path LIKE '%'||#{cmwaExportPath}||'%', cmca_file_type LIKE '%'||#{cmcaFileType}||'%', cmca_subject_id LIKE '%'||#{cmcaSubjectId}||'%', source_code LIKE '%'||#{sourceCode}||'%', belong_cmwa LIKE '%'||#{belongCmwa}||'%', version LIKE '%'||#{version}||'%', allow_down LIKE '%'||#{allowDown}||'%', secondary_field LIKE '%'||#{secondaryField}||'%' WHERE ModelNo LIKE '%'||#{modelNo}||'%'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) AS noTxmodelCount FROM hpeapm."spl_mainten_db" a WHERE a."is_tx" = '0' AND a."model_no" LIKE '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
mapper.update: UPDATE hpeapm."spl_mainten_db" a SET a."is_tx"='1' WHERE A."model_no" LIKE '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM hpeapm."xbpj_bonc_model" WHERE model_no LIKE '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
mapper.select: SELECT 'Y' AS isOnlineSup, a."model_url" AS onlineSupUrl, a."business_area" AS businessAre, a."source_domain" AS sourceDomain, a."secondary_field" AS secondaryField, c.source_plat_form AS sourcePlatForm, c.three_group_result AS threeGroupResult, c.subject_second_class AS subjectSecondClass, a."bonc_audit_point" auditCode, a."cmwa_export_path" cmwaExportPath, a."cmca_file_type" cmcaFileType, a."cmca_subject_id" cmcaSubjectId, a."source_code" sourceCode, a.belong_cmwa belongCmwa, a."version" "version", a.allow_down allowDown, a."ModelNo" AS auditModelNumber FROM hpeapm."xbpj_operation_flow" a LEFT JOIN hpeapm."xbpj_model_statistics" c ON a."ModelNo" = c.model_no WHERE a."ModelNo" LIKE '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%' LIMIT 1

SELECT COALESCE(a.primary_business_process, '') AS business1, COALESCE(a.secondary_business_process, '') AS business2, a.information_sources AS model_source, a.remark as remark, cc.name share_unit, bb.ModelName AS second_model_number, a.business_area AS businessAre, a.source_domain AS sourceDomain, d.model_owner AS modelOwner, a.quality_rating AS qualityRating, a.running_mode AS runningMode, COALESCE(b.sources_audit_practice, '') AS source, COALESCE(b.ascription_special, '') AS field, COALESCE(a.audit_point_number, '') AS auditPointNo, COALESCE(a.audit_point_name, '') AS auditPointName, COALESCE(a.audit_model_number, '') AS modelNo, COALESCE(a.audit_model_name, '') AS modelName, TO_CHAR( TO_DATE( COALESCE(b.model_online_time, ''), 'YYYY-MM-DD' ), 'YYYYMM' ) AS model_online_time, COALESCE( a.expected_data_covers_unit_demand, '' ) AS audit_scope, COALESCE(a.syn_url, '') AS model_url, COALESCE(b.model_online_time, '') AS model_OnlineJi_Time, COALESCE(a.audit_business_logic, '') AS model_logic, COALESCE(a.execution_logic, '') AS executionLogic, COALESCE(b.service_ownership_system, '') AS home_system, COALESCE(b.model_running_frequency, '') AS modelrunning_frequency, c.modeling_method AS modelingMethod, d.dock_deputy AS modelingUser, d.dock_people AS modelingUserName, d.dock_dept AS modelingDeptName, b.number_units_covered AS units, b.number_of_provincial AS sunits, b.number_professional_institutions AS zyunits, CASE WHEN b.whether_cured_system = '1' THEN '是' ELSE '否' END AS is_cured, CASE WHEN sources_audit_practice = '持续审计' THEN '0' WHEN sources_audit_practice = '风险扫描' THEN '1' WHEN sources_audit_practice = '远程审计支撑' THEN '2' WHEN sources_audit_practice = '智能审计' THEN '3' END AS order FROM hpeapm.audit_elements_info a LEFT JOIN hpeapm.audit_elements_online_model b ON a.audit_model_number = b.audit_model_number LEFT JOIN hpeapm.audit_elements_model_evaluation c ON a.audit_model_number = c.audit_model_number LEFT JOIN hpeapm.spl_model_type d ON a.audit_model_number = d.audit_model_number LEFT JOIN hpeapm.xbpj_company_model bb ON a.second_model_number = bb.ModelNo LEFT JOIN ( (SELECT DISTINCT ("busiunitcode" || orgcode) AS id, (provincename || '-' || orgname) AS name FROM hpmgr.bonc_union_orginfos WHERE "busiunitcode" = 'CM000') UNION ALL (SELECT DISTINCT "busiunitcode" AS id, provincename AS name FROM hpmgr.bonc_union_orginfos WHERE "busiunitcode" != 'CM000' ORDER BY "busiunitcode") ) cc ON a.share_unit = cc.id WHERE a.audit_model_number LIKE '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%' LIMIT 1
SELECT COUNT(*) AS modelCount FROM hpeapm."xbpj_model_statistics" a WHERE a."model_no" LIKE '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hpeapm.xbpj_model_statistics (zr_person, model_no, model_name, down_num, browse_num, source_plat_form, three_group_result, subject_second_class, running_mode, model_source, example_problem_discovery, example_clue_extension_verification, institutional_basis) VALUES ( #{modelOwner},#{modelNo}, #{modelName}, 0, 0, #{sourcePlatForm}, #{threeGroupResult}, #{subjectSecondClass}, #{runningMode}, #{model_source}, #{example_problem_discovery}, #{example_clue_extension_verification}, #{institutional_basis} )
mapper.update: UPDATE hpeapm."xbpj_model_statistics" SET zr_person LIKE '%'||#{modelOwner}||'%', model_name LIKE '%'||#{modelName}||'%', source_plat_form LIKE '%'||#{sourcePlatForm}||'%', three_group_result LIKE '%'||#{threeGroupResult}||'%', subject_second_class LIKE '%'||#{subjectSecondClass}||'%', running_mode LIKE '%'||#{runningMode}||'%', model_source LIKE '%'||#{model_source}||'%', example_problem_discovery LIKE '%'||#{example_problem_discovery}||'%', example_clue_extension_verification LIKE '%'||#{example_clue_extension_verification}||'%', institutional_basis LIKE '%'||#{institutional_basis}||'%' WHERE model_no LIKE '%'||#{modelNo}||'%'
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM hpeapm."xbpj_operation_flow" WHERE ModelNo LIKE '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
DELETE FROM hpeapm."xbpj_model_statistics" WHERE model_no LIKE '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hpeapm.xbpj_company_model_statistics (model_number, model_name, order_num, browse_num, zr_person, model_source, running_mode, institutional_basis, example_problem_discovery, example_clue_extension_verification) VALUES ( #{modelNo},#{modelName},0,0,#{modelOwner},#{model_source},#{runningMode},#{institutional_basis},#{example_problem_discovery},#{example_clue_extension_verification} )

insert into hpeapm.xbpj_company_model
business1,
business2,
"source",
business_area,
field,
AuditpointNo,
AuditpointName,
ModelNo,
ModelName,
source_domain,
model_online_time,
audit_scope,
secondary_field,
model_logic,
home_system,
datastart_time,
modelrunning_frequency,
is_cured,
modelint_type,
modeling_dept,
modeling_dept_name,
org_code,
org_code_name,
modeling_user,
modeling_user_name,
is_share,
model_url,
data_source,
order_depts,
execution_logic,
#{business1},
#{business2},
#{source},
#{businessArea},
#{field},
#{auditPointNo},
#{auditPointName},
#{modelNo},
#{modelName},
#{sourceDomain,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{model_online_time},
#{audit_scope},
#{secondaryField,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{model_logic},
#{home_system},
#{datastartTime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{modelrunning_frequency},
#{is_cured},
#{modelintType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{modelingDept,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{modelingDeptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{orgcodeId},
#{orgcodeName},
#{modelingUser,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{modelingUserName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{isShare,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{model_url},
#{data_source},
#{orderDepts,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
#{executionLogic}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM hpeapm."xbpj_company_model" WHERE ModelNo LIKE '%'||#{modelNo}||'%'
DELETE FROM hpeapm."xbpj_company_model_statistics" WHERE model_number LIKE '%'||#{modelNo}||'%'
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT a."busiunitcode" FROM hpmgr.bonc_union_orginfos a WHERE a.provincename LIKE '%' || REPLACE(#{modelingDeptName}, '公司', '') || '%'
mapper.update: UPDATE hpeapm."audit_elements_model_evaluation" a SET a."model_state" = '完成开发' WHERE a."audit_model_number" LIKE '%'||#{mxzdModelNumber}||'%' AND a."is_deleted" = '0'

UPDATE hpeapm.audit_elements_info a SET a.audit_point_name LIKE '%'||#{autoPointName}||'%' , a.audit_model_name LIKE '%'||#{autoModelName}||'%' , a.audit_business_logic LIKE '%'||#{auditModelBusinessLogic}||'%' , a.execution_logic LIKE '%'||#{executionLogic}||'%' , a.subordinate_to_system LIKE '%'||#{dataToSystem}||'%' , a.expected_risks LIKE '%'||#{expectedAuditFind}||'%' , a."model_code" LIKE '%'||#{modelCode}||'%' , a."business_area" LIKE '%'||#{businessArea}||'%' , a."source_domain" LIKE '%'||#{sourceDomain}||'%' WHERE a."audit_model_number" LIKE '%'||#{modelNumber}||'%'
UPDATE hpeapm."spl_model_type" a SET a.audit_model_type = '12' WHERE a."audit_model_number" LIKE '%'||#{modelNumber}||'%'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM hpeapm."spl_mainten_msg" a WHERE a."audit_model_number" LIKE '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO hpeapm.spl_mainten_msg (audit_model_number, is_online_sup, online_sup_url, business_area, source_domain, secondary_field, menu_id, menu_name, audit_code, cmwa_export_path, cmca_file_type, cmca_subject_id, source_code, version, belong_cmwa, allow_down, source_plat_form, three_group_result, subject_second_class) VALUES (#{auditModelNumber}, #{isOnlineSup}, #{onlineSupUrl}, #{businessAre}, #{sourceDomain}, #{secondaryField}, #{menuId}, #{menuName}, #{auditCode}, #{cmwaExportPath}, #{cmcaFileType}, #{cmcaSubjectId}, #{sourceCode}, #{version}, #{belongCmwa}, #{allowDown}, #{sourcePlatForm}, #{threeGroupResult}, #{subjectSecondClass})
mapper.update:
UPDATE hpeapm."spl_mainten_msg"
"is_online_sup" LIKE '%'||#{isOnlineSup}||'%',
"online_sup_url" LIKE '%'||#{onlineSupUrl}||'%',
"business_area" LIKE '%'||#{businessAre}||'%',
"source_domain" LIKE '%'||#{sourceDomain}||'%',
"secondary_field" LIKE '%'||#{secondaryField}||'%',
"menu_id" LIKE '%'||#{menuId}||'%',
"menu_name" LIKE '%'||#{menuName}||'%',
"audit_code" LIKE '%'||#{auditCode}||'%',
"cmwa_export_path" LIKE '%'||#{cmwaExportPath}||'%',
"cmca_file_type" LIKE '%'||#{cmcaFileType}||'%',
"cmca_subject_id" LIKE '%'||#{cmcaSubjectId}||'%',
"source_code" LIKE '%'||#{sourceCode}||'%',
"version" LIKE '%'||#{version}||'%',
"belong_cmwa" LIKE '%'||#{belongCmwa}||'%',
"allow_down" LIKE '%'||#{allowDown}||'%',
"source_plat_form" LIKE '%'||#{sourcePlatForm}||'%',
"three_group_result" LIKE '%'||#{threeGroupResult}||'%',
"subject_second_class" LIKE '%'||#{subjectSecondClass}||'%',
WHERE "audit_model_number" LIKE '%'||#{auditModelNumber}||'%'
UPDATE hpeapm.spl_mainten_msg SET status =0 WHERE audit_model_number LIKE '%'||#{modelNumber}||'%'
mapper.select: SELECT audit_model_number, is_online_sup, online_sup_url, business_area, source_domain, secondary_field, menu_id, menu_name, audit_code, cmwa_export_path, cmca_file_type, cmca_subject_id, source_code, version, belong_cmwa, allow_down, source_plat_form, three_group_result, subject_second_class FROM hpeapm.spl_mainten_msg where status = '1' and audit_model_number LIKE '%'||#{auditModelNumer}||'%'

SELECT a."ModelNo" audit_model_number, a."model_url" online_sup_url, a."business_area" AS business_area, a."source_domain" AS source_domain, a."secondary_field" AS secondary_field, a."bonc_audit_point" AS audit_code, a."cmwa_export_path" cmwa_export_path, a."cmca_file_type" cmca_file_type, a."cmca_subject_id" cmca_subject_id, a."source_code" AS source_code, a."version" AS "version", a."belong_cmwa" AS belong_cmwa, b."source_plat_form" AS source_plat_form, a."allow_down" AS allow_down, b."three_group_result" AS three_group_result, b."subject_second_class" AS subject_second_class FROM hpeapm."xbpj_operation_flow" a LEFT JOIN hpeapm."xbpj_model_statistics" b ON a."ModelNo" = b."model_no" WHERE a."ModelNo" LIKE '%'||#{auditModelNumer}||'%'
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM hpeapm.audit_elements_data_cut_in WHERE audit_model_number IN
#{auditModelNumber};

DELETE FROM hpeapm.audit_elements_data_support_v2 WHERE audit_model_number IN
#{auditModelNumber};

DELETE FROM hpeapm.audit_elements_find_database WHERE audit_model_number IN
#{auditModelNumber};

DELETE FROM hpeapm.audit_elements_handover_model WHERE audit_model_number IN
#{auditModelNumber};

DELETE FROM hpeapm.audit_elements_info WHERE audit_model_number IN
#{auditModelNumber};

DELETE FROM hpeapm.audit_elements_model_evaluation WHERE audit_model_number IN
#{auditModelNumber};

DELETE FROM hpeapm.audit_elements_online_model WHERE audit_model_number IN
#{auditModelNumber};

DELETE FROM hpeapm.audit_elements_operation_steps WHERE audit_model_number IN
#{auditModelNumber};
